Description:
Ship AI recommendations, interactive quizzes, learning paths, mobile offline beta, and gamification to increase course starts, completion, and Weekly Learning Minutes (WLM).
KPIs: Course Start Rate, D30 Completion, Paid CVR, DAU/MAU, NPS. North Star: Weekly Learning Minutes per Active Learner.

Summary: AI Recommendations MVP — Personalized “Recommended for you” rail
Description:
Headline: “Show me the next best course—right when I’m ready.”
User Story: As a learner, I want a personalized “Recommended for you” rail on Home & Catalog so that I can quickly find relevant courses without searching.
Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin):
Scenario: Recommendations visible on Home
  Given I am an authenticated learner with at least 1 enrolled course
  When I open the Home screen
  Then I see a "Recommended for you" rail with at least 8 items
  And each item shows title, provider, rating, and time-to-complete
Scenario: Cold-start fallback
  Given I am a new learner with no activity
  When I open Home
  Then I see a popularity- & category-based fallback list
Scenario: Recommendation clickthrough
  Given I see the recommendation rail
  When I click a recommended course
  Then I land on the course detail page
  And an event "rec_click" is emitted with {course_id, position, algo_variant}
Scenario: Model guardrails
  Given a course is not available in my region or plan
  When the model returns that course
  Then it is filtered out and replaced by the next best candidate
Events: rec_impression, rec_click, rec_enroll, rec_dismiss.
DoD: AC pass; events verified; feature-flagged; privacy copy approved.

Summary: Interactive Quiz Engine v1 — Inline quizzes with instant feedback
Description:
Headline: “Let me check my understanding as I learn.”
User Story: As a learner, I want short in-lesson quizzes with instant feedback so that I can validate my progress and fill gaps.
Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin):
Scenario: Inline quiz appears in lesson
  Given a lesson with a quiz block
  When I reach the quiz section
  Then the quiz renders with question, options, and "Check answer"
Scenario: Instant feedback
  Given I answered the question
  When I tap "Check answer"
  Then I see correct/incorrect feedback and an explanation
  And an event "quiz_attempt" is sent with {lesson_id, question_id, correct}
Scenario: Retry
  Given I answered incorrectly
  When I retry
  Then I can attempt again (max 2 retries) and feedback updates
Scenario: Accessibility
  Given I navigate via keyboard or screen reader
  Then all quiz interactions are accessible per WCAG AA
Events: quiz_impression, quiz_attempt, quiz_completed.
DoD: WCAG AA checks; analytics QA; authoring docs for instructors.

Summary: Learning Paths 1.0 — Auto-curated sequences with progress tracking
Description:
Headline: “Guide me from beginner to job-ready.”
User Story: As a learner with a goal (e.g., Data Analyst), I want an auto-curated path of courses so that I can progress without deciding each step.
Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin):
Scenario: Path generation
  Given I select a goal and experience level
  When I tap "Generate path"
  Then I receive a sequenced list of 5–8 courses with estimated duration and prerequisites
Scenario: Progress tracking
  Given I have started the path
  When I complete a course
  Then the path shows progress % and unlocks the next course
Scenario: Swap equivalence
  Given I can't access a suggested course
  When I tap "Swap"
  Then I see 2–3 equivalent alternatives with similar learning outcomes
Events: path_created, path_course_started, path_course_completed, path_swap.
DoD: AC pass; telemetry verified; help center article updated.

Summary: Mobile App Beta — Offline lesson downloads & playback
Description:
Headline: “Learn anywhere—even when I’m offline.”
User Story: As a mobile learner, I want to download lessons for offline playback so that I can study with limited connectivity.
Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin):
Scenario: Download lesson
  Given I am on a lesson detail screen
  When I tap "Download"
  Then the lesson downloads and shows progress and available offline badge
Scenario: Offline playback
  Given the device is offline
  When I open the downloaded lesson
  Then video and resources play locally without errors
Scenario: Storage management
  Given I have multiple downloads
  When I open "Downloads"
  Then I see size per item and a "Remove" option
Security/DRM: encrypt assets at rest; block screen recording where required.
Events: download_start, download_complete, offline_play.
DoD: QA on low-end devices; storage edge cases; analytics verified.

Summary: Gamification Lite — XP, streaks, and milestone badges
Description:
Headline: “Reward my consistency to keep me motivated.”
User Story: As a learner, I want XP for study actions, streaks for daily learning, and badges for milestones so that I stay engaged.
Acceptance Criteria (Gherkin):
Scenario: XP earning
  Given I spend time learning
  When I complete a lesson/quiz
  Then I earn XP according to rules and see a toast
Scenario: Streaks
  Given I have learned for N consecutive days
  When I open the app
  Then I see my streak count and a nudge if I'm about to lose it
Scenario: Badges
  Given I achieved a milestone
  When I view my profile
  Then I see the badge unlocked with date and criteria
Events: xp_earned, streak_day, badge_unlocked.
DoD: rate-limiting; anti-gaming rules; copy & assets approved.
